Tote Weave Bag 🏖️
Hot drop! Jamie tote updated with raffia material. This tote is more chill than lambskin, full of vacation vibes. Impressive capacity! Sunscreen, sunglasses, straw hats all fit. Unique weave texture records the warmth of the sun. Every photo radiates leisure and comfort!
Model: 809824
Size: 35X35X10

items.name_cn:
VOLTAIRE Handbag and Crossbody
This name is derived from the French writer and philosopher Voltaire of the 18th century, who advocated freedom and advocated for a loose style. The entire bag is made of top-tier glossy box calf leather, making it soft and shiny, while amplifying the texture of the leather surface. The crescent bag shape is a very chic contemporary design, possessing many elements of the Bourgeoisie style of a fashion house, fully displaying an elegant charm and perfectly embellishing a city style!
Model: 787671
Size: 24×15×5cm

items.name_cn:
West Hollywood_Small
If you love vintage bags and have always wanted a unique, everyday style, this is the perfect choice! It has a great vintage feel and a cool vibe~
The bag has plenty of capacity. With a flap design and four compartments including a zipper, the outer layer holds a lot, making it perfect for commuting or going out.
Size: 24×15×10
Model: 738820
